# Pratik Dhanave

> Agentic AI Architect with 7+ years building production cloud-native and multi-agent AI systems on Google Cloud, AWS, and Azure. Upstream contributor to Microsoft's official Go SDK for the Agent Framework (microsoft/agent-framework-go), and author of production-grade open-source AI reference implementations.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://pratikdhanave.com/): overview, featured open source, experience, and impact
- [Microsoft Agent Framework Go](https://pratikdhanave.com/agent-framework/): upstream contributions to microsoft/agent-framework-go — runtime-correctness and safety fixes
- [Projects](https://pratikdhanave.com/projects/): production systems and architectures
- [Open Source](https://pratikdhanave.com/open-source/): open-source contributions and projects
- [Resume](https://pratikdhanave.com/resume/): full professional experience
- [Recommendations](https://pratikdhanave.com/recommendations/): LinkedIn recommendations from mentors, managers, peers, and clients
- [Contact](https://pratikdhanave.com/contact/): professional inquiries

## Writing

- [Blog](https://pratikdhanave.com/blog/): technical writing on agentic AI, Go, cloud architecture, security, and RAG
- [LangGraph, Concept by Concept](https://pratikdhanave.com/blog/tags/langgraph/): an 11-part series covering every LangGraph concept plus a glossary
- [Featured articles](https://pratikdhanave.com/featured/): selected in-depth pieces

## Also

- [Speaking](https://pratikdhanave.com/speaking/): talks, including Google Cloud Next 2022
- [Mentoring & GSoC](https://pratikdhanave.com/gsoc/): Google Summer of Code mentorship
- [Certifications](https://pratikdhanave.com/certifications/)
